retrieved_note: Pilot extraction from official public pages and HBL Islamic schedule of bank charges PDFs. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year free issuance for HBL Uraan, HBL Islamic Rutba, all Islamic Asaan accounts, HBL Islamic Mahana Amdan, and Freelancer Digital Account. Second year onwards annual fees apply.

notes: Overview page confirms issuance through account-opening form or additional request form.
The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC shows primary annual fee PKR 2,000 and supplementary annual fee Nil.

cards.card_name: HBL Islamic Mastercard Standard Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance charges for Mastercard Standard are waived for first year for HBL Islamic Nisa Tawfir account holders. Free debit card for HBL @ Work Islamic customers.

notes: Public page shows product availability and limits; current fee values come from the Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC.
The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC shows primary annual fee PKR 3,000 and supplementary annual fee PKR 550.

cards.card_name: HBL Islamic Mastercard Gold Debit Card
notes: The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC shows primary annual fee PKR 3,800.
The same 2026 ISOBC marks supplementary annual fee as N/A for Mastercard Gold.
Public page shows card limits and application flow; current fee values come from the Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC.
The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC shows primary annual fee PKR 20,000 and marks supplementary annual fee as N/A.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC says Mastercard Business Classic issuance and annual fee are 100% waived for the business-customer product.

notes: Recovered as the current official public business debit-card product rather than a separate Classic Business tier.

The Jan-Jun 2026 Islamic Schedule of Bank Charges lists the standard Mastercard Business Classic fee at Rs. 8,000, but the same ISOBC note says issuance and annual fee are 100% waived for the business-customer product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC says Mastercard Business World issuance is 100% waived and annual fee is charged at 50% of the standard schedule amount for the business-customer product.

notes: Recovered as the current official public world business debit-card product.
The Jan-Jun 2026 Islamic Schedule of Bank Charges lists the standard annual fee for the Mastercard Business World card at Rs. 22,000 before the public business-customer waiver note.

cards.card_name: HBL Islamic Prestige World Elite DebitCard

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free issuance, renewal, and replacement for HBL Islamic Prestige members.

notes: The PKR 5,000,000 threshold reflects surfaced Islamic Prestige account eligibility.
RDA route of USD 50,000 equivalent also appears publicly, but the normalized fields currently store the PKR current/saving threshold only.
The Jan-Jun 2026 ISOBC lists Mastercard Titanium primary annual fee at PKR 3,000.
No public salary, balance, or age threshold was found.

gaps: Public pages did not expose salary or age thresholds for most consumer debit cards.
No public HBL Islamic consumer credit-card catalogue was found in this pass.
